arts.ttl: Brighton agree deal to sign teenage South Korean winger Yoon
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion have agreed to sign winger Yoon Doyoung from South Korean club Daejeon Hana Citizen on 1 July. Yoon came through Daejeon's academy and represented the club at Under-18 level before making his first-team debut in May 2024.

arts.ttl: Done deal: Brighton complete transfer for Sunderland sensation Tom Watson - deal runs until June 2029
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion have confirmed they’ve struck a deal to sign Sunderland youngster Tom Watson.

arts.ttl: Report: Aston Villa keen on signing £55m defender previously deemed the 'best centre-back in the world'
arts.sum: Aston Villa are enjoying a superb season under Unai Emery and will be eager to build on their success in the summer transfer window. Meanwhile,...

arts.ttl: Premier League to finally use new offside technology THIS season as start date revealed
arts.sum: The Premier League will follow in both UEFA and FIFA's footsteps and use semi-automated offsides for the final part of the 2024-25 season, it's been confirmed

arts.ttl: Brighton v Aston Villa: FPL team news + predicted line-ups

arts.ttl: "How good was that" - Aston Villa faithful give verdict on end of Marcus Rashford goal drought - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has scored his first goals for Aston Villa, helping the club beat Preston North End to reach the semi-finals of the FA Cup - and Villa fans in the Birmingham Live comments section are delighted to see Rashford and other new acquisitions contribute during an exciting time as the club chase major honours. Rashford scored his first goals to help Villa into the FA Cup semi-finals

arts.ttl: Unai Emery defiant as Aston Villa success comes with consequences
arts.sum: Wednesday night’s game against Brighton (7.45pm kick-off) will be the second of seven matches to be played within just 20 days. Aston Villa manager Unai Emery sat down with the media ahead of facing Brighton on Wednesday night
